title: Bonamia agrostopolis
taxonomy: Bonamia agrostopolis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Bonamia, which is primarily native to tropical Africa. Bonamia agrostopolis is further classified as a member of the family Apocynaceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants often known as dogbane or oleander family. The family Apocynaceae is part of the larger clade of asterids, which are a group of flowering plants that also include the families Scrophulariaceae, Gentianaceae, and others. Within the family Apocynaceae, Bonamia agrostopolis is likely to be closely related to other species within the same genus and family.
